meaning: n.[电子]双压电晶片元件(亦作bimorph cell)
examples: In order to describe the characteristics of piezoelectric bimorph, properties of PZT film are studied by SEM and XRD.
In this dissertation, only the piezoelectric bimorph micro-actuator and valveless piezoelectric micro pump are introduced.
A new type of the PZT driving device to realize the planar movement by using the bimorph oscillator as the driver was presented.
